activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'AB Regin' is explicitly found in the invoice in invoice address and header sections including corporate name and address (Turkey address noted but consignor matches company name). No contradictions found and country Sweden is consistent after normalization.

consignee.invoice_value:
Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.
Atatürk Mah. 2. Cadde No: 2/1
34758 Atatürk / Istanbul
Turkey
consignee.motivation: Consignee name from certificate matches exactly company name in invoice address and delivery address fields. Address details and country 'Turkey' match with normalization. Consignee found in standard invoice roles without contradictions.

goods_description.invoice_value:
Duct sensor with 1,5m cable, NTC, 0...30°C
Duct sensor with 1,5m cable, NTC, 0...60°C
Connection unit M-Bus/SIOX
Expansion unit Ardo, 4 AI, 8 DI, 4 UI, 5 AO, 7 DO, RS485, Ethernet
Clamp-on sensor with housing, PT1000, -20...+120°C, including clamp
Electrical heating controller, 3-phase, 25A, 230V/415V, DIN-rail mount
Electrical heating controller, 16A, 230/400V, 0-10V input, DIN-rail
Fan-coil controller, 230V, touch display, on/off, change-over, com.
goods_description.motivation: Certificate uses a general goods description referencing multiple attached invoices, consistent with the presence of detailed product lines in invoices matching the referenced range F549422-F549430. The goods descriptions are known and covered by these invoices as per general invoice reference rule.

quantity.invoice_value: Total Net Weight: Sum of line weights 214.845 kg NW approx
quantity.motivation: Quantity of 214,845 kg NW from certificate is explicitly confirmed as Net Weight in invoices, summing invoice lines with normalized numbers and unit matching. Decimal truncation and unit consistency applied. No mismatch found.

origin.invoice_value: Country of origin in all invoices is either China or Sweden explicitly
origin.motivation: Certificate indicates two origin countries: China and Sweden. Invoices specify origin per line but the certificate indicates EU origin overall. Because certificate lists both countries and the EU origin is implied by invoice declarations, full explicit matching of origin per article and country needs manual verification for exact consistency and interpretation of EU preferential origin claims.

manual_review_triggers: 4.5.4.1: Multiple origin countries with EU preferential origin declarations require manual review
overall_assessment.decision_summary: Certificate's consignor and consignee match invoice details. Quantity and goods description verify well against invoices referencing specific invoice numbers. Origin countries span China and Sweden with EU origin declared in invoices, requiring manual review for preferential origin compliance.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet och fakturan stämmer överens beträffande avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning och kvantitet. Ursprungslandet behöver granskas manuellt eftersom certifikatet anger flera ursprungsländer och fakturan anger EU-preferensursprung som kräver bedömning.
